hard_gates: Startup costs show assumptions and source-backed anchors

Rewrote awkward copy and removed generic research-loop wording.

Tuned slides 3, 4, 10, 11 and 16 for spacing, alignment and footer clearance.

Lifted footer metadata so presenter controls no longer collide with sources or slide numbers.

Clarified slide 15 as a paid-hours model, not a utilisation percentage.

remaining_judgment_calls: Cost ranges remain planning estimates until Chleo has a real address, contractor quotes and lease terms.
